title: panicum scabrum subsp. stagninum
intro: Panicum scabrum subsp. stagninum, also known as Water Panicum, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Panicum scabrum subsp. stagninum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various health concerns. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
